case_title: SUSANNAH R BALDWIN VS. ZDT ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY BALDWIN, SUSANNAH R AS TO DEFENDANT ZDT ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-27-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ZDT ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALDWIN, SUSANNAH R SERVED OCT-27-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZDT ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALDWIN, SUSANNAH R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZDT ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
